title: Unsure how to approach CS50? Carter Zenke answers.
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, available through edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare. The course is taught by David J. Malan and maintains active communities across Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and other platforms.
writeup: CS50, Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, is available through edX, the Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, and the video features Carter Zenke addressing how to approach the course. The course is taught by David J. Malan and is supported by active communities on Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and other platforms. The practical takeaways: multiple access routes exist for taking CS50, and ongoing community channels provide support beyond the lecture material.
